title: deserialize_optional_nullable_string allocates intermediate Value
description: deserialize_optional_nullable_string (types.rs:23) deserializes into serde_json::Value as an intermediate step before dispatching on Null vs String. This causes a heap allocation on every ChatPresenceEvent field deserialization. Two fields use this deserializer (status_text, status_emoji), so each presence event triggers two intermediate Value allocations. A visitor-based implementation that dispatches directly on Null vs String without materializing an intermediate Value would eliminate these allocations from the hot SSE event path.
